message:
feat(fwc): add map-over-inputs batch command (bead qnchs.7.1)

Adds `fwc map` (alias `fwc batch`) for applying one operation to N inputs
with concurrency control. Supports inline JSON array, JSONL file, and
template + items input sources. Produces a BatchPlan with preview inputs.

- batch.rs: BatchInputs, BatchPlan, BatchSummary, OnError, results_to_ndjson
- MapArgs with --inputs, --input-file, --input-template, --items, --concurrency, --on-error
- map_dispatch wired into CLI dispatch
- 8 integration tests + 26 unit tests (1049→1057 total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
